title: Introduction to GCP Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) basics.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Google Cloud Platform (GCP)'?
options: Providing a comprehensive and secure set of cloud-based products—including computing and storage—for your project's application
